title: Allogene’s first cut of data on ‘off-the-shelf’ CAR-T shows promise
summary: Allogene Therapeutics’ CAR-T therapy removed all remaining detectable lymphoma cells in just over half of treated patients, according to an early look at the Phase 2 data. The Bay Area biotech ...

title: Allogene’s off-the-shelf CAR-T erases lingering lymphoma cells in early slice of data
summary: Cema-cel eradicated minimal residual disease in seven of 12 patients, compared to two of 12 participants in the observational control arm.
